calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allison Zamani, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP, Tel. 415.344.7119, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs PROVIDENCE FOUNDATION OF SAN FRANCISCO and PROVIDENCE BAPTIST CHURCH's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
